subject: LU-18720 quota: check for project quota

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

Patch Set 2:

I've added a trivial check:
@@ -890,8 +890,10 @@ int qsd_op_begin(const struct lu_env *env, struct qsd_instance *qsd,
                RETURN(0);
 
        if (local_flags && qi->lqi_id.qid_projid &&
-           (qsd->qsd_root_prj_enable || !qi->lqi_ignore_root_proj_quota))
+           (qsd->qsd_root_prj_enable || !qi->lqi_ignore_root_proj_quota)) {
+               LASSERT(qi->lqi_type == PRJQUOTA);
                *local_flags |= QUOTA_FL_ROOT_PRJQUOTA;
+       }

and immediately hit it:
== sanity-quota test 0: Test basic quota performance ===== 11:11:20 (1739963480)
[   34.191840] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity-quota test 0: Test basic quota performance ===== 11:11:20 (1739963480)

so I wonder whether the original check is correct? I'm not really familiar here. please, advise.

Patch Set 2:

> 
> so I wonder whether the original check is correct? I'm not really familiar here. please, advise.

Hi Alex,
That is what I've already replied to Sebastien. The original check introduced in "LU-16415 quota: enforce project quota for root" looks wrong. This feature is required only for PROJECT, so no reasons to check USER and GROUP.

commit.subject: LU-18720 quota: check for project quota
commit.message:
LU-18720 quota: check for project quota

lqi_ignore_root_proj_quota should be checked only with project quota,
otherwise it's state is undefined and can lead to undefined results.

Fixes: 2686838fef ("LU-18240 sec: enforce per-nodemap project quota for root")
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-quota,sanity-quota,sanity-quota
Test-Parameters: fstype=zfs testlist=sanity-quota,sanity-quota,sanity-quota
